info: Grants +10 Health, +10 Ether, +5% Damage Vs. Monsters, and +5% Monster Armor to the equipment's stats.
name: Drowned
in_game_desc: Bolster the stats of your equipment, adding an additional +10 Health, +10 Ether, +5% Damage Vs. Monsters, and +5% Monster Armor. Only one drowned item can be equipped.
